name: Keep Rheumatoid Arthritis Patients
remarks: Synthea 'keep module' used with the -k command line flag.
After a patient is fully simulated, Synthea runs this module against the
finished record. The Guard state below only allows the module to reach
Terminal when the patient has an ACTIVE Rheumatoid arthritis condition
(SNOMED-CT 69896004, as emitted by Synthea's rheumatoid_arthritis module).
Patients who never satisfy the Guard are discarded and never exported,
